dialogues.text: I seem to have misplaced my card. Could you front me $10? Embarrassing really.
dialogues.yes_response: Terribly kind. I'll have my assistant wire it back.
dialogues.no_response: I suppose I'll ring someone. How inconvenient.

dialogues.text: I need someone to collect a parcel from the courier office. I'll pay $15 for the errand.
dialogues.yes_response: Just show this receipt. They'll hand it right over.
dialogues.no_response: I'll send the driver. He'll complain but he's paid for it.

dialogues.text: The valet charge is $8 and I only have hundreds. Split it with me?
dialogues.yes_response: I'll owe you. My accountant will sort it.
dialogues.no_response: I'll break the bill somewhere. Tedious.

dialogues.text: Stand at the door of my event and turn away anyone not on the list. $20 for the evening.
dialogues.yes_response: The list is right here. Be firm but polite.
dialogues.no_response: I'll hire a proper doorman. More expensive but whatever.

dialogues.text: I'm short $6 for the newspaper subscription renewal. Spare change?
dialogues.yes_response: Awfully decent of you. One must stay informed.
dialogues.no_response: I'll read it on the phone like a peasant I suppose.

dialogues.text: Carry my shopping bags to my car? Three bags, one block. $12.
dialogues.yes_response: It's the silver one. Try not to scratch it.
dialogues.no_response: My back will suffer for this decision.

dialogues.text: Tip fund for my regular table. They deserve more. $5 from you?
dialogues.yes_response: Generosity is a lost art. You still have it.
dialogues.no_response: I'll cover it entirely. As usual.

dialogues.text: Find a working power outlet in this building and let me know. $8.
dialogues.yes_response: Just text — oh, you don't have my number. Come find me.
dialogues.no_response: I'll ask the staff. If there are any.

dialogues.text: Could you cover a $9 cab? I left my wallet in my other trousers.
dialogues.yes_response: Prompt reimbursement. You have my word.
dialogues.no_response: I'll walk. The fresh air will be good for me.

dialogues.text: I need someone to sit through a meeting and take notes for me. $18 for two hours.
dialogues.yes_response: Just summarize the key decisions. Nothing too detailed.
dialogues.no_response: I'll have to attend it myself. Dreadful.
